# gnokey transaction query vectors

Target realm: `gno.land/r/core/ibc/v1/core`

The values below are generated by `tools/gen-ibc-test-client/main.go`.
Run this when you want to regenerate or audit where each hex/key/value came
from:

```sh
cd tools/gen-ibc-test-client
go run .
```

`gnokey maketx call` can only pass primitive values and `[]byte` values. In
this realm, only `CreateClientRaw` is directly call-friendly today.

That means section 1 is the only direct `gnokey maketx call` command in this
document. Sections 2-10 call functions whose signatures take `Msg*` structs,
so there is no valid `gnokey maketx call -args ...` form for them unless the
realm adds matching `Raw` helper functions. Their sections therefore provide
the exact copyable field vectors and ABCI proof queries; use `maketx run` for
those transactions.

The `07-cometbls` fixtures are old devnet proofs, so the generated client state
uses a 10-year trusting period. If you already created a client with an older
14-day trusting period vector, restart/reset the local dev chain before running
these commands again; the expired client cannot be repaired by `UpdateClient`.

## 0. Register 07-cometbls

Run this once before `CreateClientRaw`. Without this, `CreateClientRaw` fails
with `client type not found`.

Copy-paste setup (`RegisterClient` takes an adapter value, so this also cannot
be expressed as a direct `maketx call`):

```sh
cat >/tmp/register_cometbls.gno <<'EOF'
package main

import (
	core "gno.land/r/core/ibc/v1/core"
	cometbls "gno.land/r/core/ibc/v1/lightclients/cometbls"
)

func main() {
	if !core.HasClient(cometbls.ClientType) {
		core.RegisterClient(cross, cometbls.ClientType, cometbls.Adapter{})
	}
	println("registered", string(cometbls.ClientType))
}
EOF

gnokey maketx run -gas-fee 1000000ugnot -gas-wanted 50000000 -broadcast -chainid dev -remote tcp://127.0.0.1:26657 test1 /tmp/register_cometbls.gno
```

## Decode ABCI Data

ABCI proof queries use `path=".store/main/key"` and `data=0x...`, where
`data` is ASCII `/pv/<params-key>` encoded as hex. The response still returns
base64 in `Data`; decode it with:

```sh
python3 -c 'import base64,sys; print(base64.b64decode(sys.argv[1]).hex())' '<DATA_BASE64>'
```

## 1. CreateClient

Source: `createClientArgs`, `encodeClientState`, `encodeConsensusState`,
`clientStatePath`, `consensusStatePath`.

Copy-paste transaction:

```sh
gnokey maketx call -pkgpath gno.land/r/core/ibc/v1/core -func CreateClientRaw -args 07-cometbls -args  -args 000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000180a0696b346ce00ee7e3e58f98ac95d63ce93b270981df3ee54ca367f8d521ed1f444717595cd3620ddfe7a0f75c65d876316091eccd494a54a2bb324c872015f73e528d53cb9c4 -gas-fee 1000000ugnot -gas-wanted 50000000 -broadcast -chainid dev -remote tcp://127.0.0.1:26657 test1
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A61366565663765333561626537303236373239363431313437663739313535373363376539376234376566613534366635663665333233303236336263623439&prove=true'
# decoded Data: 8bd63d7a9f25e7479c72e1b086590c29394841a30ed323866b10567df265ef2f

curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A36643966326134663336636663343665636535333737663261643531623138613064373136353263366561626139386564343931313266346533373230656238&prove=true'
# decoded Data: 5c472dc8054e98962b7b829056516d03476da26570c0307b8fe21ba4590fac87
```

## 2. UpdateClient

Source: `updateClientArgs`, `encodeHeader`, `encodeClientState`,
`encodeConsensusState`.

Copyable field vector:

```txt
ClientId: 1
ClientMessage:

```

Copy-paste transaction (`maketx run`, required because `UpdateClient` takes
`MsgUpdateClient`):

```sh
cat >/tmp/update_client.gno <<'EOF'
package main

import (
	"encoding/hex"

	core "gno.land/r/core/ibc/v1/core"
)

func main() {
	msg, err := hex.DecodeString("")
	if err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}

	height := core.UpdateClient(cross, core.MsgUpdateClient{
		ClientId:      core.ClientId(1),
		ClientMessage: msg,
	})
	println("UpdateClient", height.String())
}
EOF

gnokey maketx run -gas-fee 1000000ugnot -gas-wanted 90000000 -broadcast -chainid dev -remote tcp://127.0.0.1:26657 test1 /tmp/update_client.gno
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A61366565663765333561626537303236373239363431313437663739313535373363376539376234376566613534366635663665333233303236336263623439&prove=true'
# decoded Data: c87c6bb593a7c24edc25f72a4bac572f3d74b2aeae08a0e160bc649486f4abd8

curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A37613465616663383236633233333637343761363634613962616330313561613764363134373035393138653937633465376365616563646133303162393038&prove=true'
# decoded Data: 9bde23a806d12a2416478d96b6f51fd32c7855f502805a2032b303bc2ad61421
```

## 3. ConnectionOpenInit

Source: `connectionOpenInitArgs`, `encodeConnection`, `connectionPath`.

Copyable field vector:

```txt
ClientId: 1
CounterpartyClientId: 99
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A64396431366433346666623135626133613364383532663064343033653263653164363931666235346465323761633837636432663939336633656333333066&prove=true'
# decoded Data: dd3bd04844795d6062e33b74fb77ef2ce5c287e0d2590cd0da2b809360400e60
```

## 4. ConnectionOpenTry

Source: `connectionOpenTryArgs`, `z35ConnectionTryProofHex`,
`encodeConnection`, `connectionPath`.

Copyable field vector:

```txt
ClientId: 1
CounterpartyClientId: 99
CounterpartyConnectionId: 1
ProofInit:

ProofHeight: 3405691581
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A36373937393561303139356131623736636465626237633531643734653035386165653932393139623863333338396166383665663234353335653861323863&prove=true'
# decoded Data: 20cf8521310a1ec2b499774cde02c75d779839513f8a78ef0e479eb6f5f244bc
```

ConnectionId: 1

ProofTry:

## 6. ConnectionOpenConfirm

Source: `connectionOpenConfirmArgs`, `encodeConnection`, `connectionPath`.

Copyable field vector:

```txt
ConnectionId: 2
ProofAck: REPLACE_WITH_CONNECTION_OPEN_PROOF_HEX
ProofHeight: 3405691581
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A36373937393561303139356131623736636465626237633531643734653035386165653932393139623863333338396166383665663234353335653861323863&prove=true'
# decoded Data: 8ef33231cbb281c2a959c532bb4fb7c317e003f21c766c1697271b321a450edc
```

## 7. ChannelOpenInit

Source: `channelOpenInitArgs`, `encodeChannel`, `channelPath`.

Copyable field vector:

```txt
PortId: g1TODO_PORT
CounterpartyPortId: g1TODO_PORT
ConnectionId: 1
Version: ucs03-zkgm-0
```

Verify:

```sh
curl 'http://localhost:26657/abci_query?path=%22.store/main/key%22&data=0x2F70762F766D3A676E6F2E6C616E642F722F636F72652F6962632F76312F636F72653A37646665373537656364363563626437393232613963303136316539333564643766646263633065393939363839633764333136333338393662316663363062&prove=true'

```
